code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut has_seen = false
mut max_v = 0
mut min_v = 0

while i < n + 1
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
  else
    32
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        if not has_seen
          max_v = v
          min_v = v
          has_seen = true
        else
          if v > max_v
            max_v = v
          end
          if v < min_v
            min_v = v
          end
        end
      when None
        current = current
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("max=#{max_v}")
println("min=#{min_v}")
